user.title: Chore Tracker Setup
user.description: Choose where to store your tasks.

m365_creds.title: Microsoft 365 — App credentials
m365_creds.description:
Enter your Azure App Registration details.

**Add this Redirect URI in Azure → Authentication:**
`https://homeassistant.peterborough.madasc.com:8123/api/chore_tracker/oauth_callback`

See the README for full step-by-step setup.

m365_oauth.title: Sign in to Microsoft
m365_oauth.description: Click **Open Microsoft login** to sign in with your Microsoft 365 account and grant permission to access your To Do tasks.

m365_list.title: Select To Do List
m365_list.description: Choose which Microsoft To Do list to sync with Chore Tracker.

error.auth_failed: Microsoft login was cancelled or failed. Please try again.
error.no_auth_code: No authorisation code received from Microsoft.
error.token_failed: Failed to exchange code for tokens. Check your Client Secret.
